{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Capital citizens
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Capital citizens]] reacted to the shattering of alchemical flasks by shouting and attacking.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
